commands.title: Inspect GitLab Runner configuration
commands.description: Review runner executor, tags and privileged mode.

commands.title: Require protected runner usage
commands.description: Document the expected hardening state for protected pipelines.
commands.command: Ensure the runner is locked to protected branches and trusted tags in GitLab settings.

verification.command: Review GitLab runner settings in the project or group UI.
verification.expected: Runner is locked, tagged and restricted to protected refs.
